titleStmt.title: SII 6.640: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 640. (A.R. No. 194 of 1899). ON THE EAST WALL OF THE SAME TEMPLE; FIRST TIER.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . śakava¨rṣamulu 1073 nēṁṭi pramōdasaṁvatsaramuna kanyamāsamuna sōmagrahaṇanimittamuna koṭṭiyadona śrītribhuvanamallakēśavadēvaraku svasti sakalasurāsurādhīśvaraparamēśvarapaḍihārīkriti vasiṣṭagōtra kriṣṇadhvajapaiśācika paṭupaṭaha ghōṣaṇa vriṣabhalāṁcchana naṁdagirinātha paṟvipuravarādhīśvara kā¨rmmakharāma monagemuṁko
lva Ahitadhanaṁjaya patihitābharaṇasahaja yakāṟa śaraṇāgatavajraprākāra samaraikamā¨rtta yubhayarāyakaṭakamunneṟva celvānegalla gajadānamalla kī¨rttigenalla vīrape¨rbbāṇa śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara cūṟaballirāju tama taṁḍri cūṟaballirājunaku dha¨rmmuvugāṁ gammanāṁṭilōna mā jīvitaṁbaina ṟāmakūri tū¨rppuna kriṣṇarēvaḍu
bhūmi padivuṭlunu yūri yuttaramuna reṁḍu vuṭluṁgā berasi paṁḍreṁḍu vuṭlu havibaliya¨rcchanalaku nācaṁdrā¨rkkatārakamugā niccitimi . bahubhi¨rvvasudhā dattā bahubhiścānupālitā . yesya yesya yedā bhūmi tasya tasya tadā phalaṁ . 1 svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vvā yō harēti vasuṁdharā[ṁ .*] śaṣṭi¨rvvaruṣasahasrāṇāṁ viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ [.]
Digital edition of SII 6.640 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
